title: David New Ores
description: adds new ores to the game.
body:
David New Ores is mod that introduces epic new ores to enhance your mining and crafting experience. Designed to expand the depth of exploration and customization in the game, this mod adds unique resources with the best tools and promises even more content in future updates.

Features:

New Ore: Imtesting Ore
Found in the Overworld.
Its similar to diamond but offers unique crafting possibilities.
Custom Tools:
Each ore introduced by the mod will include a full set of tools, designed to deliver new gameplay options.
Planned Updates:

Ores for the Nether and The End are currently in development, promising even more resources to discover in dangerous and exotic dimensions.
Environment Information:

Client and Server-Side Compatibility:
This mod must be installed on both the client and the server, as it adds new blocks, items, and features that require synchronization for proper functionality.
Why Should You Download?
David New Ores is perfect for players looking to expand their mining adventures with fresh content. Whether you're a builder seeking new materials or an adventurer eager to discover unique resources, this mod offers something for everyone.


Explore, craft, and Mine with David New Ores!

(Note: This Description has been altered by AI and modified by a human)
